name: kaanha-agents
description: Kaanha Tech's autonomous squads: the original four (code-guardian nightly code health, daily-ops morning digest, design-warden weekly design audit, growth-marketer weekly SEO/competitive check) plus the config-driven fleet seven (site-sentinel 6-hourly uptime, repo-night-watch nightly dep/advisory audit, code-reviewer nightly diff review, security-auditor weekly defensive audit, growth-scout weekly market research, overnight-builder one backlog task per night on a builder/* branch, flow-tester nightly Playwright e2e in real Chromium). Fleet targets live in dev/fleet.json; every squad rewrites its HTML report in docs/reports/.
